agent_runStep.name: agent_runStep
agent_runStep.description: Execute a specific step in the agent workflow

stepName.description: Name of the step to execute

agent_runErrorStep.name: agent_runErrorStep
agent_runErrorStep.description: Execute a error step in the agent workflow. It will always run

errorDetails.description: Information for handling the error message. This will be passed along with instruction for the error step.

agent_endFlow.name: agent_endFlow
agent_endFlow.description: Last step of the flow. This tool will set the return value of the flow.

result.description: Result of the execution. This can be a string or an object converted to string

agent_sendMessage.name: agent_sendMessage
agent_sendMessage.description: Send message on the communication channel

agent_setStepContext.name: agent_setStepContext
agent_setStepContext.description: Set context information for a step. This can be used when for Agent type step, where some additional dynamic information needs to be passed, which cannot be available during initial step generation. The caller can call this method and set it. FOr example, if result from one agent needs to be passed to another agent

stepName.description: step name to receive this context
